mapper.sql: id, user_id, session_no, player_name, current_age, current_step, life_status, current_story, current_choices, game_status, ending_summary, score, created_time, updated_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM game_session WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE game_session SET current_age = #{currentAge}, current_step = #{currentStep}, life_status = #{lifeStatus}, current_story = #{currentStory}, current_choices = #{currentChoices}, game_status = #{gameStatus}, ending_summary = #{endingSummary}, score = #{score} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
